servers.description: Real-time and historical market data (US stocks, forex, crypto) via Twelve Data.

secrets.name: TWELVEDATA_API_KEY
secrets.description: Twelve Data API key (free tier covers US/forex/crypto; Europe needs a paid plan).

servers.notes: The Cowork connector bridge caps tools/list payload size; -n 5 keeps it under the limit.

servers.description: Free worldwide market data via Yahoo Finance, including European exchanges (.DE, .PA, .MC, .MI, .AS, .L). Maintained fork with an illiquid-symbol crash fix.
servers.notes: Clone the pinned tag, run 'uv venv' + 'uv pip install -e .', then set command to the absolute path of '.venv/bin/mcp-yahoo-finance' (Windows: '.venv\Scripts\mcp-yahoo-finance.exe'). No API key required.

servers.description: US SEC EDGAR filings and financial statements.

secrets.name: SEC_EDGAR_USER_AGENT
secrets.description: Identifying string 'Name email' that SEC requires on every request. Whatever you put here is sent with each request (semi-public); use a real contact.

servers.description: Crypto market data, prices, and metadata via CoinGecko.
servers.notes: Free public CoinGecko API; no key required for basic usage.

servers.description: Fetch a URL and return its content as Markdown for the model to read.
